---
title: "Lessons from Both Sides of the Table"
subtitle: "UIC Advanced Investment Management"
author: "John W. Pearce, CFA, CAIA"
date: 2026-03-09
categories: [UIC]
---

I will be speaking during both sections of John Wightkin's Advanced Investment Management course on March 9, 2026.

# Agenda

Agenda:

-   A

-   B

-   C

# Resources
